title: rubus psilops
intro: Rubus psilops, also known as the dewberry or thimbleberry, is a type of flowering shrub in the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus psilops include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Rubus psilops can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is also used in jam-making and other culinary applications.
